target.label: token emitter pipeline — web CSS + Tailwind preset + TUI theme

rationale: Substrate+tooling emitter story whose § Testing Standards (story line 243-246) explicitly defers per-AC automated coverage to Story 1.13 (pre-commit source-output sync gate re-runs the emitter in --check mode on every pre-commit, covering AC 3/4/5 integration) + Story 1.16 (test-runner landing — optional per-AC unit / snapshot / purity-sandbox probes if still deemed value-adding). Story § Testing Standards:246 AFFIRMATIVELY DECLARES spec-declared CR-substitution for adversarial AC 2 determinism + AC 6 purity coverage via `/bmad-code-review (args: '2')` Blind Hunter / Edge Case Hunter / Acceptance Auditor fan-out. The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at Story 1.12 substrate stage. iter-63 substrate evidence (STRONGEST of the six cumulative WAIVED precedents): AC 1 verified via iter-63 Task 1 emitter execution (three output paths + provenance header shape + one-line stdout summary; single source read enforced by `readFileSync('packages/ui/tokens.json')` exclusivity). AC 2 SUBSTRATE_VERIFIED strongest — Task 6 two determinism smokes end-to-end: smoke 1 byte-identical round-trip across two back-to-back runs (CSS `4b59cb67...` / Tailwind `c7bd57fa...` / Python `7776b448...` matching sha256sum); smoke 2 source-change propagation via targeted `sed -i` edit on `color.accent.500` (54%→55%) producing divergent outputs + verbatim alias-downstream flow to `accent.default` / `text.accent` / `state.in-progress` + revert via `git checkout -- tokens.json` restoring byte-identical run-1 baseline. AC 3 verified via emitted `packages/ui/src/tokens.css` (118 lines; 90 base + 16 dark overrides under `:root { }` + `[data-theme="dark"] { }` blocks; kebab full-path CSS var naming `--color-surface-raised` / `--color-status-success-fg` / `--color-accent-500` / `--breakpoint-2xl`; alias-flatten at emit-time per § AC 3 carve-out; all 8 token groups covered). AC 4 verified via emitted `packages/ui/tailwind.preset.ts` (119 lines; `keelTailwindPreset` named export with 9 `theme.extend.*` namespaces including custom `motionScale` + `densityScale`; flat-kebab keys per § AC 4 carve-out; base-only mode overlay). AC 5 verified via emitted `packages/devbox/tui/theme.py` (135 lines; SimpleNamespace base + `theme.dark` overlay; snake_case slugs with segment-local hyphen→underscore + digit-segment transforms — `state_in_progress`, `type_xl2`, `breakpoint_xl2`, `space._0`; Python-stdlib-only `from types import SimpleNamespace` sole import; sibling zero-byte `__init__.py` emitted). AC 6 verified via emitter source code inspection (node stdlib only — `node:fs`/`node:path`/`node:url`/`node:crypto`/`node:child_process`; zero network/time/RNG/env reads) + AC 2 determinism smokes (empirical proof of purity at runtime). Pre-documented variances (NOT gaps): source-SHA resolver command deviation from § AC 1 literal (`rev-parse` → `log -1 --format=%h` — intent-matching correction; rev-parse form returns repo HEAD which self-contradicts the same carve-out's `NOT HEAD of the repo` constraint; documented in emitter source-file header + Debug Log + Change Log v1.2); emitter-owned canonical byte-format (outputs `.prettierignore`d — prettier owns emitter source, emitter owns generated outputs; `.prettierignore` addition captured as NEW lesson for Story 1.13+ emit-target pairs); gamut-mapping OPT-OUT default per § AC 6 scope carve-out (re-defer forecast to Story 1.13 at iter-66 CR); shadow-machinery EXPLICIT OUT OF SCOPE per § AC 6 scope carve-out (requires source mutation of Story-1.11-frozen tokens.json; carry-to Story-1.17-TBD). All substrate quality gates green (typecheck 16 tasks / lint 16 / build 16 with scoped `@keel/keel-invariants` rebuild per iter-51 / format:check / prek 3 hooks Pass). `pnpm keel-invariants:check` clean-path exit 0 on first sync-gate invocation post scoped-build — `INV-tokens-emitter` manifest entry (sha256 `6ee7731efb65d1cecd9aa35a51d377cf6a25c3543dc8433f74a761cc71442796`) + INVARIANTS.md column-0 anchor bullet all aligned. FR14n ATDD-skip precedent applied at iter-62 on hybrid-ground-(c) variant-(ii)+(iii) rationale (Story 1.13 downstream-gate for AC 3/4/5 + spec-declared CR adversarial substitution for AC 2 + AC 6); trace gate mirrors that decision — SIXTH CUMULATIVE WAIVED PRECEDENT for contract-only/contract-populator/data-only/emitter+tooling substrate stories (Stories 1.7 + 1.8 + 1.9 + 1.10 + 1.11 + 1.12).
